task_completion.description: Locate the medical record for patient Walter Bishop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medical application UI displays the patient profile or search results for 'Walter Bishop'.

task_completion.description: View the patient's medications and allergies in the medical application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medical application UI shows the medications list (including Digoxin, Warfarin) and allergies list (including Penicillin, Strawberries) for Walter Bishop.

task_completion.description: Create the transfer summary text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal is open, showing the creation or editing of a file named 'transfer_summary.txt' (or saved to /home/ga/transfer_summary.txt).

task_completion.description: Include all active medications and known allergies in the summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal output clearly shows the strings 'Digoxin', 'Warfarin', 'Penicillin', and 'Strawberries' written in the file.

task_completion.description: Ensure inactive medications are omitted from the summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal output for the summary file does NOT contain the string 'Amoxicillin'.

integrity.description: The agent used the medical application GUI to retrieve patient data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the actual medical software UI, rather than querying the backend database directly via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely created and edited the text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a real text editor (like gedit, mousepad, nano, or vim) or standard terminal commands (echo, cat) being used to write the file.

integrity.description: The agent extracted data that matches the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The compiled summary should only contain the medications and allergies actually visible in the patient's record during the trajectory, without hallucinated additions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Walter Bishop. Output File Path: /home/ga/transfer_summary.txt. Required Active Medications to include: Digoxin, Warfarin. Required Allergies to include: Penicillin, Strawberries. Forbidden Inactive Medication to omit: Amoxicillin.
